name: facades_modernize
description: Convert historical building facades to modern photorealistic views

prompt_templates.positive: photorealistic modern building facade, architectural photography, high quality, detailed, natural lighting, 8k
prompt_templates.negative: drawing, painting, sketch, illustration, engraving, low quality, blurry, distorted, text, watermark

notes: Optimized for building facades. Canny edge detection preserves sharp architectural lines. Consider MLSD for perspective lines.
